category_sources: source_facts.description says internetarchive is a Python wrapper for the various Internet Archive APIs; official GitHub README describes a Python and command-line interface to Archive.org.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is internetarchive; official GitHub repository and Archive.org docs use internetarchive as the package name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to Archive.org services documentation for internetarchive.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/jjjake/internetarchive; official README identifies it as the Python and CLI interface to Archive.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Python wrapper for Internet Archive APIs; official README says it installs the ia command-line tool and internetarchive Python module.
